hypothesis: Invocation 33 continued the smallest unfinished gate: first executable validation of the hardened Q0.24 top-k comparator cutout. If Verilator could start, the RTL/testbench would be compiled and run against the checked-in expected-state oracle; because command startup remains blocked by the sandbox loopback error, no simulator, Python replay, synthesis, bitstream, or hardware evidence is promoted.

decision.rationale: The Q0.24 comparator remains the correct tiny next gate and static readback still shows the prepared RTL/testbench covering the intended oracle, but Verilator and Python cannot start. The only promoted change is an honest blocked artifact and handoff update.
decision.next_gate: Recover command startup, then run: verilator --binary --timing -Wall rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare.sv rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb.sv && ./obj_dir/Vtask6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb. If it passes, emit h2-q024-topk-comparator-cutout-result.json; if it fails, fix only the tiny comparator/testbench.

next_gate: First simulator validation of the hardened Q0.24 comparator cutout; no DDR3 integration, full TinyStories synthesis, OpenFPGALoader, JTAG, FTDI, or MPSSE commands.
